title: How to Create Custom Skills in Claude  (Step-by-Step)
summary: A YouTube tutorial explaining how to create custom skills in Claude to control output formatting and structure. The example demonstrates a "Smart PDF Analyzer" skill that produces 5-point summaries with highlighted data and formatted headings, improving output quality without changing the underlying model.
